title: Recursive vs. Authoritative Resolution
description: Distinguish between recursive and authoritative DNS resolution processes. Analyze the DNS caching hierarchy and its impact on query performance. Evaluate the effect of Time-To-Live (TTL) values on global traffic steering and failover mechanisms.
objectives: Distinguish between recursive and authoritative DNS resolution processes.
Analyze the DNS caching hierarchy and its impact on query performance.
Evaluate the effect of Time-To-Live (TTL) values on global traffic steering and failover mechanisms.
